mission: Maintain a public-safe living-book artifact with explicit source, evidence, proof, and release boundaries.
governance_model: proposal-only steward; human maintainer approval required for protected actions
authority_ceiling: draft plans, propose work contracts, run local validation, and record evidence
budget_policy: zero autonomous spend; all spend becomes an approval request
evidence_policy: support-state movement requires mapped sources, tests, proofs, or accepted release artifacts
release_policy: publish only after validation, render, commit, push, and Pages verification
contribution_policy: separate authorship, review, evidence, compensation, reputation, and governance effects
federation_policy: external workers require explicit work contracts and sandboxed artifact boundaries
sunset_criteria: review if maintainers, users, funds, or mission coherence disappear
non_claims: This fixture does not deploy a steward bot.
This fixture does not grant spending or governance authority.
